events.title: AKShare 市场层最小采集
events.note: 当前仅采集指数日线数据；情绪、板块和个股证据仍需后续数据源补齐。

events.title: sh000001 使用腾讯行情备用路径
events.note: AKShare stock_zh_index_daily_em 和东方财富 K 线直连失败后，使用腾讯指数 K 线接口；原始错误：[upstream_unavailable] HTTPSConnectionPool(host='push2his.eastmoney.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/qt/stock/kline/get?secid=1.000001&fields1=f1%2Cf2%2Cf3%2Cf4%2Cf5&fields2=f51%2Cf52%2Cf53%2Cf54%2Cf55%2Cf56%2Cf57%2Cf58&klt=101&fqt=0&beg=19900101&end=20500101 (Caused by ProxyError('Unable to connect to proxy', RemoteDisconnected('Remote end closed connection without response')))；东方财富错误：[upstream_unavailable] Remote end closed connection without response
